noticias.titulo: Why Perella Weinberg (PWP) Shares Are Sliding Today
noticias.resumen: Shares of financial advisory firm Perella Weinberg Partners (NASDAQ:PWP) fell 4.6% in the afternoon session after April CPI came in hot at 3.8% year-over-year, lifting the 10-year Treasury yield to 4.43%, a mixed signal for investment banks.
